values.content:
=You are an expert resume parser. Extract structured data from the resume text below and return ONLY valid JSON with no markdown formatting, no code blocks, and no explanations.

RESUME TEXT:
{{ $json.raw_text }}

Return ONLY this JSON structure (fill in the actual data):

{
  "personal_info": {
    "full_name": "string",
    "email": "string or null",
    "phone": "string or null",
    "location": "string (city, state/country) or null",
    "linkedin": "string (URL) or null",
    "portfolio": "string (URL) or null",
    "github": "string (URL) or null"
  },
  "professional_summary": "string (2-3 sentences summarizing their background) or null",
  "work_experience": [
    {
      "company": "string",
      "title": "string",
      "location": "string or null",
      "start_date": "string (MM/YYYY format)",
      "end_date": "string (MM/YYYY or 'Present')",
      "duration": "string (e.g., '2 years 3 months')",
      "responsibilities": ["string", "string"],
      "achievements": ["string"]
    }
  ],
  "education": [
    {
      "institution": "string",
      "degree": "string",
      "field_of_study": "string or null",
      "graduation_date": "string (MM/YYYY) or null",
      "gpa": "string or null"
    }
  ],
  "skills": {
    "technical": ["string"],
    "soft_skills": ["string"],
    "tools": ["string"],
    "languages": ["string (e.g., 'English - Native')"]
  },
  "certifications": [
    {
      "name": "string",
      "issuer": "string",
      "date": "string (MM/YYYY) or null",
      "credential_id": "string or null"
    }
  ],
  "projects": [
    {
      "name": "string",
      "description": "string",
      "technologies": ["string"],
      "url": "string or null"
    }
  ],
  "total_years_experience": 0
}

CRITICAL RULES:
1. Return ONLY the JSON object - no markdown, no ```json```, no explanations
2. If a field is not found in the resume, use null or empty array []
3. Extract ALL skills mentioned (technical, tools, soft skills)
4. Calculate total_years_experience from work history
5. Dates must be in MM/YYYY format (e.g., "06/2020")
6. Be thorough - extract as much information as possible
7. For responsibilities and achievements, create separate bullet points
8. If email/phone not found, use null
9. The JSON must be valid and parseable
